item.title: Accelerate your workflow from local Python prototype to the cloud (Sponsor: Microsoft)
item.description:
Description

Have you ever struggled taking a Python application from your local machine to the cloud? Had a hard time figuring out what infrastructure you need or how to configure it for your app? Spent too much time researching how to set up your local development environment for cloud development? Learn how to use real-world cloud development application templates via CLI to go from local development environment to the cloud. Scaffold your application, provision resources, deploy code, monitor your application health, and set up a CI/CD pipeline, all in a couple of steps and just a few minutes.
item.dc:creator: Savannah Ostrowski
